summary: Strong early set with guest Matt Kelly and a solid Truckin > Smokestack Lightning > High Time sequence; clear recording praised by listeners
review: The show opens powerfully with Matt Kelly’s harmonica adding a fresh flavor to the first numbers, highlighted by a fiery Truckin > Smokes​tack Lightning > High Time run. Reviewers note that the recording is clean and enjoyable, making the performance easy to appreciate despite limited technical commentary. Overall the concert is regarded as a good example of late‑season 1985 energy.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gives a solid 4‑star endorsement of both performance and recording; the other provides no numeric rating but shares enthusiastic comments, leading to an overall rating just below four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer calls it a "great recording" with no specific issues mentioned; there are no details about soundboard vs. audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening highlighted by guest harmonica and a high‑energy trio of Truckin, Smokes​tack Lightning, and High Time; the set is described as consistently strong.
